# CWE-273 — Improper Check for Dropped Privileges (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-273-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"syscall"
)

// Vulnerable: ignores whether Setuid actually lowered privileges.
func ServeAfterDrop(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.Header().Set("Cache-Control", "no-store")
	_ = syscall.Setuid(1000)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"serving":true}`))
	_ = r.RemoteAddr
}
